entries.name: EP30DPBF

evidence.result: Different official product; page states it is a new version of EP30DPMed.

entries.note: No current exact official Master Bond page was found for EP30DPBF. Do not treat EP30DPBFMed as the same SKU.

entries.name: MT3835

evidence.result: No exact official Permabond product result
Different official product: MT3836

entries.note: No current exact official Permabond page was found for MT3835. Do not treat MT3836 as the same SKU.

entries.name: A905

evidence.result: Official TDS identifies A905 as an Anaerobic Surface Activator used with Permabond anaerobic adhesives and sealants.

entries.note: A905 is a surface activator/accelerator, not an adhesive product; exclude from the glue product backlog while retaining evidence.

entries.name: ASC10

evidence.result: Official TDS identifies ASC10 as an Anaerobic Surface Conditioner / accelerator for Permabond anaerobic adhesives and sealants.

entries.note: ASC10 is a surface conditioner/accelerator, not an adhesive product; exclude from the glue product backlog while retaining evidence.

entries.name: QFS10

evidence.result: Official TDS identifies QFS10 as a cyanoacrylate activator used to accelerate Permabond cyanoacrylate adhesive cure.

entries.note: QFS10 is an activator/accelerator, not an adhesive product; exclude from the glue product backlog while retaining evidence.

entries.name: QFS16

evidence.result: Official TDS identifies QFS16 as a cyanoacrylate activator used to accelerate Permabond cyanoacrylate adhesive cure.

entries.note: QFS16 is an activator/accelerator, not an adhesive product; exclude from the glue product backlog while retaining evidence.

entries.name: TA452

evidence.result: Official page identifies TA452 as a low-odor 1:1 two-part toughened acrylic adhesive, but no official TDS/PDF or numeric technical data was exposed on the checked page.

entries.note: TA452 is adhesive-relevant, but page-only marketing claims are insufficient for the high-fidelity manual TDS catalog; keep blocked until an official TDS is found.

entries.name: TC-2035

evidence.result: Official 3M page identifies the product as 3M Thermally Conductive Grease TCG-2035, under Lubricants > Thermally Conductive Greases, with 3M ID B5005035139. The page describes it as a thermal interface material for transferring heat to a heat sink/spreader, not as an adhesive.

Official 3M TDS is for TCG-2035 Thermally Conductive Grease, not TC-2035 adhesive. Extracted non-adhesive TDS fields: gray color; inorganic thermally conductive filler; non-silicone polymer base; max particle diameter <40 micron; shear modulus G' = 3150 Pa at 25 C; density 2.92 g/cm3; dielectric constant 5.4 at 1 kHz; volume resistivity 1.36 x 10^9 ohm-cm; dielectric strength 4700 V/mm; thermal impedance 0.012 C-in2/W / 0.081 C-cm2/W by modified ASTM D5470; thermal conductivity 4.1 W/m-K by modified ASTM D5470; shelf life 9 months from manufacture at 21 C and 50% RH; application pressure about 1-25 psi; optional 40-50 C heat to lower viscosity for flow/gap thickness.
Exact TC-2035 adhesive TDS found for DOWSIL TC-2035, a Dow product, and encoded separately as dow-dowsil-tc2035.

entries.note: Do not satisfy the 3M TC-2035 seed with either non-adhesive 3M TCG-2035 grease or a different-maker Dow adhesive. The official 3M source is a grease/TIM, so it remains excluded from the adhesive catalog despite extractable thermal-interface fields.

entries.name: Pyro-Putty 653-CE

evidence.result: Official Aremco bulletin lists Pyro-Putty 653; exact 653-CE suffix was not found on official Aremco sources checked.

entries.note: Nearest official Pyro-Putty 653 data is encoded as aremco-pyro-putty-653 with an explicit caution; keep exact 653-CE blocked until official suffix-specific TDS is found.

entries.name: MM4001

evidence.result: Official Born2Bond product index lists Ultra K85, Ultra Gel, Light Lock, Flex, Repair, Structural, MP515, Ultra, Aquafast, Instant Tough, anaerobic families, HMPUR HHD Series, UV-CIPG AU Series, UV EE, LC 2100 Gel, LC 177, and service products, but no MM4001/MM-4001/MM 4001.

Official downloads page exposes technical data sheets for named Born2Bond products including XMA 5005, MP515, Structural, Flex, Repair, Ultra variants, HMPUR, anaerobics, UV-CIPG, UV EE and LC products, but contains no MM4001/MM-4001/MM 4001 entry.
Official 2025 catalogue describes Born2Bond XMA methylmethacrylate adhesives and lists 2K MMA products as XMA 5005, XMA 3015 and XMA 5010; text search found no MM4001/MM-4001/MM 4001.

entries.note: Do not substitute XMA 5005, MP515 or Structural for MM4001 without an official mapping.

entries.name: DUOPOX AD895

evidence.result: Official family page describes DELO DUOPOX as 2-component epoxy resin adhesives, but does not expose exact AD895 numeric TDS data.
DELO states current adhesive TDS files have moved to a portal and require registration.

entries.note: Family-level DELO DUOPOX claims are insufficient for the high-fidelity manual catalog; keep blocked until exact AD895 TDS is available.

entries.name: PHOTOBOND 4497

evidence.result: Official PHOTOBOND family page describes acrylate light-curing adhesives, but no exact public 4497 TDS values were verified.
DELO states current adhesive TDS files have moved to a portal and require registration.

entries.note: Do not encode PHOTOBOND 4497 from family-level UV-cure descriptions or unverified snippets; exact TDS is required.

entries.name: PHOTOBOND AC245

evidence.result: Official PHOTOBOND page shows public PHOTOBOND subfamilies but no exact AC245 page or TDS.
Official DELO pages use AC for MONOPOX anisotropic conductive adhesive family, not verified as PHOTOBOND AC245.

entries.note: Treat PHOTOBOND AC245 as an unresolved/exact-name target; do not fill it with MONOPOX AC family data without official SKU mapping.

entries.name: TB1101

evidence.result: TB1102 TDS exists but is a different product (TB1101 has no dedicated page)

entries.note: TB1101 has no dedicated product page or TDS on threebond.com; the discovery lead points to TB1102 which is a different product. Do not substitute TB1102 data for TB1101.

entries.name: TB1772M

evidence.result: TB1771M TDS exists but is a different product

entries.note: TB1772M has no dedicated product page or TDS on threebond.com; the discovery lead points to TB1771M (different SKU). Do not substitute TB1771M data for TB1772M.

entries.name: TB2027G

evidence.result: TB3027G TDS exists but is a different product

entries.note: TB2027G has no dedicated product page or TDS on threebond.com; the discovery lead points to TB3027G (different product series). Do not substitute TB3027G data for TB2027G.
